audit_items.proof_trace: The iterative traversal in json_value_free_ex always reads `value->parent` (L991) before freeing `cur_value` (L992), and only frees the `values` array (L964/L974) after length reaches zero with no subsequent access. Object key strings reside in the same allocation block as `object.values` and are freed atomically. All three pointer-safety invariants hold on every code path.
